questions.question: Morning person or night owl?
Would you rather live in the city or the countryside?
Dogs or cats?
Would you rather work from home forever or in an office forever?
Beach vacation or mountain vacation?
Would you rather be too hot or too cold?
Book or movie adaptation?
Would you rather have a messy creative mind or a tidy boring mind?
Would you rather always have to take the stairs or always have to wait for slow elevators?
Road trip or fly?
Would you rather have no social media or no streaming services?
Bath or shower?
Would you rather be an only child or have 5 siblings?
Window seat or aisle seat?
Would you rather always wear formal clothes or always wear pajamas?
Summer or winter?
Would you rather have a personal assistant or a self-driving car?
Would you rather move to a new country every year or never leave your hometown?
Texting or phone calls?
Would you rather have more time or more money?
